name: Clara Automation Pipeline
description: End-to-end automation pipeline for extracting account memos from transcripts and generating Retell voice agent configurations

nodes.name: Ingest Transcript
nodes.description: Watches data/demo/ or data/onboarding/ for .txt files

nodes.name: Save Outputs
nodes.description: Saves memo.json and agent_spec.json to outputs/accounts/

nodes.name: Apply Patch (Onboarding only)
nodes.description: Merges onboarding updates into v1 memo to produce v2 + changelog

nodes.name: Save Changelog
nodes.description: Saves changelog JSON and changes.md to changelogs/

setup_instructions: Run locally via: python -m batch_runner --demo OR --onboarding. No n8n installation required. Each node corresponds to a Python script that can be wrapped in an n8n Execute Command node if desired.
